warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squats
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Snatch Balance
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

strength.name: Snatch Balance
strength.description:
1x2 | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.

02:00 2

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 9 mins
3 Bar Muscle Ups
6 Power Snatches @ 60/40
scale BMU to C2B/Pull up /RRow
rx+ RMU

hypertrophy.reasoning: Snatch and BMU heavily tax shoulders, quads, and chest; posterior chain and arms recover independently.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Snatch Balance, 1 by 2. Strength: Snatch, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 9 minutes: 3 Bar Muscle Ups, 6 Power Snatches @ 60/40, rx+ RMU. For hypertrophy, focus on Hamstrings, Glutes, Back (Rows).
